'''Bolabo Hujaan''' was a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] technician.

==Biography==
A gifted technician from a young age, Hujaan left [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]] as soon as she could find a starship that would take her. Bolabo was an associate of [[Timma Briss]] and [[Kn'ik Th'ronik]].

[[File:Bolabo_Hujaan2.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Bolabo Hujaan, [[Starship/Legends|starship]] technician.]]

Drifting from ship to ship, Hujaan learned first hand the operations of hundreds of starships, and eventually settled down on [[Byblos/Legends|Byblos]] to establish her own facility, [[Bolabo's Garage]]. To maintain security and secrecy, Hujaan paid off a number of contacts in [[Byblos Starport Security]]. Hujaan earned a reputation for expert repairs and creative modifications, particularly amongst [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] agents, but she never did anything for free and demanded payment up front. When parts were unavailable, Hujaan called on her skills as a smuggler to acquire them. Some of Hujaan's most impressive work was on [[Dash Rendar/Legends|Dash Rendar's]] [[Outrider/Legends|''Outrider'']], although if any modification proved a failure, she claimed it was Rendar's work.
